L1.description: An API endpoint for AI-assisted database operations is missing authentication middleware, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to invoke it and perform arbitrary database operations using the application's privileged master key. No identity verification or session validation is applied before processing requests.

ground_truth.reason: The AI agent API endpoint lacks authentication middleware, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to send requests and perform arbitrary database operations against any connected Parse Server using the master key.
